title: orxera cornuta
intro: Orxera cornuta, also known as the horned orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in various forms of medicine, particularly in Asia, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Orxera cornuta include its ability to help treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and reduce fever. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
